issues: Uncited data point: '380M parameter LSTM translation model' lacks source reference
Ambiguous claim: 'faster by 2-3 times' without specifying training vs. inference speed
Redundant repetition of '1000-token processing in 1 step' (appears multiple times)
suggestions: Add citation for LSTM performance data (e.g., 'as reported in [Source]' or remove unverified claim)
Clarify 'faster' refers to training efficiency (e.g., 'training speed improved by 2-3x')
Remove duplicate phrasing about token processing steps

issues: Misleading technical claim: 'processing 1000 tokens in 1 step' oversimplifies O(n²) complexity
Redundant content: Repeats points from sec_1 (e.g., parallel processing benefits)
Unverified statistic: '90%+ new NLP models' lacks citation (ACL 2022 may be outdated)
suggestions: Revise to: 'Transformer processes all tokens in parallel, reducing sequential steps from O(n) to O(1) per layer'
Merge overlapping points with sec_1 to avoid repetition
Add source for model adoption statistic (e.g., 'per ACL 2022 survey')

issues: O(n²) complexity not contextualized: Fails to explain why parallelization enables speed despite higher complexity
Persistent '1 step' phrasing: Misrepresents computational steps
suggestions: Add: 'While attention complexity is O(n²), GPU parallelization reduces effective training time compared to RNNs'
Replace '1 step' with precise terms like 'single parallel computation step'

issues: Critical error: Erroneous text '# 限制审核内容量，加速处理' (likely a placeholder)
